creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
ruby@:  (whoever you are :-)

I would like to coordinate these commits,


     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163131  upgrade thrift 
to 0.8.0
     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163677 p5-thrift to 0.8.0
     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163676 this one (robo copy?)
     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163678 php5-thrift to 0.8.0
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163683> py-thrift to 0.8.0

since it is likely that devel/thrift upgrade will cascade into breaking 
this one. (it happened when I committed 0.7.0 and didn't check 
downstream ports)

I will try these, once at a time, and try to make sure they don't, but 
due to the complex interaction between all of these, it might.
If it does break ruby-thrift, I will wait till you are ready to 
approve/and or commit these.
If I have any tweaks to this I'll post them here.
-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
